title: GoRemote Is Unifying Secure Remote Access Services
author: Aberdeen Group
abstract: Aberdeen Group profile of GoRemote Communications (NASDAQ: GRIC), a leading supplier of managed communications services to remote and mobile knowledge workers. The report examines the growing challenges of managing outworkers outside the enterprise firewall, including rising telecommunications costs, security vulnerabilities, and IT support overhead. GoRemote's TierOne global network spans 150+ countries with 35,000+ access points. The profile covers GoRemote's MobileOffice universal access client, Total Security Protection service, and enterprise management portal, positioning the company as the first unified solution for outsourced remote access management with potential multimillion-dollar cost savings.
importance_rationale: Vendor profile documenting an early unified remote access solution; valuable as a snapshot of pre-cloud enterprise mobility challenges.
relevance_rationale: Remote work concepts are highly relevant today but specific technologies (dial-up, ISDN, frame relay) are obsolete; the outsourced connectivity model anticipated modern cloud-based remote access.
prescience_rationale: Predicted dramatic growth in remote/mobile worker population and the need for unified managed access services; validated by the post-2020 remote work revolution.
